api_limitation: The Zoho CRM REST API does not expose CRM Variables through any standard endpoint in the v7/v6 API. Variables are accessible only in Deluge functions via the zoho.crm.getOrgVariable() and zoho.crm.getUserVariable() functions. They cannot be listed or read externally.

known_variable_references.context: Deluge functions likely use org variables to store API keys, Pipedream webhook URLs, Retell API keys, and other secrets.
known_variable_references.note: Variable names and values are only visible inside Zoho's function editor (Setup > Functions)
